identity.title: Efficacy and safety of fecal microbiota transplantation for the induction of remission in active ulcerative colitis

question.naturalLanguageInput: Is fecal microbiota transplantation effective and safe for inducing remission in active ulcerative colitis?
question.structuredInput: In patients with active ulcerative colitis, compare fecal microbiota transplantation with placebo or standard treatment for clinical and endoscopic remission and serious adverse events; include randomized controlled trials.
eligibilityCriteria: Reports clinical remission, endoscopic remission, or serious adverse events

pubMedQueries: ("Colitis, Ulcerative"[MeSH Terms] OR "ulcerative colitis"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("Fecal Microbiota Transplantation"[MeSH Terms] OR "fecal microbiota transplant"[Title/Abstract] OR "faecal microbiota transplant"[Title/Abstract] OR FMT[Title/Abstract])
